summary: Verified 3 UI fixes on Home and Shop pages at 1440x900. Featured Collections now shows 4 evenly-sized cards in a 4-column grid (288px each) with no empty slot. Vertical gap between last category card and 'Featured Rudraksha' H2 measured 142px (reduced from prior py-24). Shop page grid renders 5 columns of ~163px cards at xl breakpoint, ~50% smaller than before. Category card links and product card links work (regression clean). One minor data anomaly flagged (see failed).
passed: Home /: 4 category cards rendered in single row, grid-template-columns = '288px 288px 288px 288px', all same top (1017), no 5th empty slot
Home /: gap between last category card bottom (1209px) and 'Featured Rudraksha' H2 top (1351px) = 142px — visibly reduced (py-14 applied)
Shop /shop: grid-template-columns = 5 columns (~163px each) at 1440px — matches xl:grid-cols-5; cards ~50% smaller than prior 1/2/3 layout
No blocking console errors on Home or Shop (only a benign React warning about empty img src attribute)

failed.issue: Categories rendered: ['Rudraksh under the hood', 'Mukhi Rudraksha', 'Rudraksha Mala', 'Bracelets']. Expected per spec: Mukhi Rudraksha, Rudraksha Mala, Bracelets, Combinations. A stray category 'Rudraksh under the hood' occupies the first slot due to sort_order, pushing 'Combinations' out of the .slice(0,4) window. Shop filter sidebar shows 5 categories including both. Not a UI-fix regression, but flagged per test brief.
failed.evidence: cat testids: ['cat-rudraksh under the hood', 'cat-mukhi-rudraksha', 'cat-rudraksha-mala', 'cat-bracelets']; Shop filter shows: Rudraksh, Mukhi Rudraksha, Rudraksha Mala, Bracelets, Combinations

action_items: Data cleanup: remove or fix sort_order of the 'Rudraksh under the hood' seed category so the 4 intended collections (Mukhi Rudraksha, Rudraksha Mala, Bracelets, Combinations) show on home Featured Collections.
